title: New WIDTH warnings on genvars
body:
---


Author Name: **Wilson Snyder** (@wsnyder)
Original Redmine Issue: 1487 from https://www.veripool.org

Original Assignee: Todd Strader (@toddstrader)

---

The following in git (unreleased) creates a warning where previously it did not, due to fixing #^A. While technically this is a WIDTH warning it is probably not helpful to users (unless the i has a MSB set that isn't representable in r).

     reg [4:0] r;
     for (genvar i=0; i < 15; ++i)
       initial begin
          r = i;
       end
